source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open HangryDash, the food delivery app at http://localhost:3007 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Place a delivery order from the Dumpling Home restaurant: add 2 orders of the Crab Soup Dumplings to your cart, then go through checkout and place the order (use your default delivery address and saved card).
